description.text: CUSTOM SALTWATER POOL + SPA | 2.5 CAR TANDEM GARAGE and better than new! This 2023-built 5 bedroom + den + loft, and 4.5 bath home delivers the space, upgrades, and lifestyle buyers are looking for right now. Ave Maria ~ "Once you get here, you get it". Step outside to your CUSTOM 2024 SALTWATER POOL & SPA, finished with Diana Royal marble non-slip pavers and a panoramic picture screen overlooking the pond-private, peaceful, and designed for entertaining. LED color-changing lighting is fully remote controlled for day-to-night enjoyment. Child safe pool gate conveniently has 2 doors for easy access to and from pool area with additional childproof features for opening the doors. Another layer for pool safety is inside the home on the sliding glass doors. Both sliding glass doors have alarm/sound when the doors are opened. Inside, the home is thoughtfully upgraded with motorized shades on sliding glass doors and dual A/C systems for efficient comfort between upstairs and downstairs. The kitchen stands out with upgraded Bosch refrigerator and dishwasher, blending style with everyday function. Quartz countertops, pull out shelving in lower cabinets, and huge island make it a cooks dream for efficient space. Whirlpool range has air fryer feature, convect bake, and self cleaning! The utility tub in upstairs laundry room can be a life saver! The extra deep 2.5 tandem car garage is a MUST HAVE for extra space! Function meets convenience with an expanded paver driveway (an extra 2' on each side) for easier parking, loading, and added play space, plus additional pavers along the side yard. The 2.5 car tandem garage offers extra storage, flexibility, and room for a golf carts, and includes an additional refrigerator/freezer. Positioned across the street from a beautifully landscaped area-not another garage-this home offers a more open and attractive view. Move-in ready and available in time to be settled before the next school year, with multiple schools within walking distance. Living in Ave Maria is a lifestyle-beautiful parks, walking and biking trails, a vibrant town center with dining and shopping, year-round events, and a true sense of community that draws people here from all over the country.

description.text: UNMATCHED SUNSET PRESERVE LOT - EXTENDED LANAI - IMPACT GLASS - TILE THROUGHOUT Stop looking-this is one of the best values on a private preserve lot in Del Webb Naples. 2BR + den / 2BA / 2-car garage with western rear exposure delivering unobstructed sunset views every night. This home hits where it matters: tile floors throughout (no carpet), impact glass, and a seamless open layout that lives bigger than expected. The space flows straight out to a screened lanai PLUS extended screened in paver patio-giving you true indoor-outdoor living with privacy you won't find on other lots. The kitchen is open with 42" white cabinets and pull out shelves in base cabinets. Large breakfast bar with quartz countertops and spacious dining area as well. The den adds flexibility for office or overflow guests with glass french doors. Guest bath is upgraded with a walk-in shower (no tub)-clean, modern, and functional. Master bath has dual sinks and large shower with integrated bench. And the lot? No rear neighbors. No distractions. Just preserve and sky. Home includes a social membership in Del Webb's active lifestyle community featuring pickleball, tennis, bocce ball, golf simulator, resort pool, lap pool, fitness center, steam room, sauna, billiards, library, and numerous social activities. Optional golf memberships available through Panther Run Golf Club. Situated in the town of Ave Maria, you can bike, walk, or golf cart into town for restaurants, shopping, dining, groceries, and more. As we say: "Ave Maria ~ Once you get here you "get it."
